search.description: Fast, cheap, read-only repo search and exploration - use this to locate files, symbols, call sites, or config before reasoning about them, instead of spending a more expensive primary agent's own turns on raw grep/read work.

docs-writer.description: Writes or updates Markdown documentation (docs/, README files, code comments) from an already-understood change - use once the actual code change is done and only the write-up is left.

test-writer.description: Writes unit/integration tests for already-implemented behavior - use once the code change itself is done and only test coverage is left.

reviewer.description: Reviews a diff for correctness, duplicated logic, and test coverage without editing anything - use for a second opinion before or after opencode-harness pushes a fix.
